ValidationRule.description: Interest Rates can't be negative values
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: $Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Bypass_Judgement_Validation__c == true && (OR( Interest_Rate_one__c < 0, Interest_Rate_two__c < 0, Interest_Rate_three__c < 0, Interest_Rate_four__c < 0, Interest_Rate_five__c < 0))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Interest Rate(s) cannot have values less than or equal to zero
